channel.title: Realme on Neueste Angebote
channel.description: Recent content in Realme on Neueste Angebote

item.title: realme 12 Pro 5G Smartphone 8+256GB Sony Portrait Camera 2X Optical Zoom IMX882 OIS Camera 6.7 inch 120Hz Curved Vision Displa 67W SUPERVOOC Charge 5000mAh Massive Battery， beige
item.description:
Sie können realme 12 Pro 5G Smartphone 8+256GB Sony Portrait Camera 2X Optical Zoom IMX882 OIS Camera 6.7 inch 120Hz Curved Vision Displa 67W SUPERVOOC Charge 5000mAh Massive Battery， beige hier:

ℹ️:

  • [Built for long-lasting power] Perfectly powerful. Snapdragon 6 Gen 1 5G Chipset, 4nm High-efficiency process. Up to 2.2 GHz Octa-core CPU. Dual carrier aggregation technology. Adopting a 3394mm² VC Cooling System that covers the main heat sources of the motherboard, you get a major boost in heat dissipation efficiency
  • [Telephoto Portrait Camera. Sony IMX882 OIS Camera. Omnifocal MasterShot Algorithm] A true next-gen photography experience. First ever 2X telephoto camera in Number Series history. Best-in-class Sony IMX882 OIS Camera. Industry’s most advanced imaging algorithm. Brought together, for our most advanced camera system ever.
  • [Beautifully brilliant. 120Hz Curved Vision Display] True flagship viewing experience. View photos in all their brilliance. Pro-XDR fully restores the dynamic range of HDR photos, ensuring the photos you view appear exactly as they were shot. 2160Hz high frequency PWM dimming will automatically turn on at low brightness.
  • [realme Design Studio × Ollivier Savéo] Following the watchmaking tradition of the 18th century, Ollivier Savéo brings designs to life through the finest details, blending perfect symmetry in phone design with countless hours of cutting, polishing, and grinding, for a design that captivates the imagination.
  • [A winning combination] 5000mAh Massive Battery, 67W SUPERVOOC Charge. Charge from 1-50% in just 19 minutes, getting you more power when you need it most. And paired with a massive 5000mAh battery, you can use your phone with the peace of mind that it was made for all-day power.

🛒 Hier!!

item.title: realme GT 7T 5G Smartphone 12+256GB 7000 mAh Battery 120W Charge Dimensity 8400-MAX Chipset IMX896 50MP Camera AI Planner 6000nits Pro-Esports 120Hz Display IP69 Blue Amazon Exclusive
item.description:
Sie können realme GT 7T 5G Smartphone 12+256GB 7000 mAh Battery 120W Charge Dimensity 8400-MAX Chipset IMX896 50MP Camera AI Planner 6000nits Pro-Esports 120Hz Display IP69 Blue Amazon Exclusive hier:

ℹ️:

  • [World’s first 7000mAh + 120W] 2 Days Moderate usage. 3 Days Light usage. 8 hours Play 120FPS PUBG.120W Ultra Charge: Get 7000mAh fully charged in 42min.TÜV Rheinland 5-Star Battery Certification.Thanks to its large capacity, safety, temperature resistance, and anti-degradation capabilities, the battery has earned the industrys first TÜV Rheinland 5-Star Battery Certification.
  • [6000nits Pro-Esports Display] Pro-level Touch, Cinema-grade Display, Paper-like Eye Care.This 6000 nits Pro-Esports Display offers outstanding brightness and color accuracy, supporting Dolby Vision and HDR10+ for stunning visuals. It enables HD HDR playback on Netflix for an immersive experience, and its ultra-precise touch responsiveness ensures seamless, lag-free gaming.
  • [Dimensity 8400-MAX Flagship Chip] 1,780,000+ AnTuTu Benchmark. LPDDR5X + UFS4.0. Over 20 top games All at 120 FPS. GT Boost Effortlessly handle multitasking with multiple floating windows and gaming. After three years, the speed remains comparable to a new device. An exclusive AI algorithm delivers powerful performance with ultra-low power consumption, ensuring stable full-frame gameplay even in high-load gaming scenarios.
  • [Flagship 50MP AI Camera] Main Camera:IMX 896 OIS WideAngle Camera: 8MP Front Camera: 32MP 2K Livephoto quality is upgraded to 2K with selectable cover frames, and enhanced image quality supports ProXDR for richer details and colors.The flagship camera module of the GT 7T supports rear 4K 60FPS, 4K 60FPS Underwater video recording, and front-facing 4K 60FPS video recording.
  • [IP69 Ultimate Water-proof] With top waterproof and dustproof standards, it prevents dust and withstands high-temperature, high-pressure water jets, giving the phone a “diving suit.”

🛒 Hier!!

item.title: realme 11 Pro 5G 8+128GB Smartphone 120Hz Curved Vision Display 100MP OIS Prolight Camera 5000mAh Massive Battery 67W SUPERVOOC Charge Astral Black
item.description:
Sie können realme 11 Pro 5G 8+128GB Smartphone 120Hz Curved Vision Display 100MP OIS Prolight Camera 5000mAh Massive Battery 67W SUPERVOOC Charge Astral Black hier:

ℹ️:

  • [120Hz Curved Vision Display] 1 billion rich colours, with high brilliance, brightness, and clarity, bringing a delectable viewing experience that always hits just right.
  • [100MP OIS ProLight Camera] Advanced In-sensor Zoom technology brings a 2× zoom that is far sharper than normal digital zooms. SuperOIS technology helps you capture moving subjects with greater confidence.
  • [67W SUPERVOOC Charge + 5000mAh Battery]A super speedy, super secure, super reliable 67W(MAX) SUPERVOOC Charge ensures you enjoy a no-nonsense phone experience, capable of charging up to 50% in 18 minutes. A massive 5000mAh battery that can last up to 19 hours of video playback
  • [Dimensity 7050 5G Chipset] 48-month long lasting fluency CPU：TSMC 6nm Process, Octa-core, Up to 2.6Ghz GPU：Mali-G68
  • [Premium Vegan Leather Design] realme Design Studio × Matteo Menotto collaborated design. For this collaboration, Matteo Menotto has created a print that incorporates a Milan urban fashion aesthetic into the design of the realme 11 Pro series.

item.title: Realme C11 2021 Dual 32GB 2GB Ram Iron Grey
item.description:
Sie können Realme C11 2021 Dual 32GB 2GB Ram Iron Grey hier:

ℹ️:

  • Ausdauernder 5000 mAh-Akku - bis zu 43 Tage Standby: Ob bei der Arbeit oder unterwegs, das realme C11 2021 erfüllt Ihre täglichen Bedürfnisse mit einem wunderbaren Kraftpaket.
  • Erweiterbar bis zu 256 GB: Wenn Sie mehr benötigen, kann das realme C11 2021 um bis zu 256 GB zusätzlichen Speicherplatz erweitert werden.
  • 8 MP KI-Kamera + 5 MP KI-Selfie-Kamera: Höhere Auflösung, bessere Qualität. Eine starke Kamera für wertvolle Erinnerungen.
  • Großes 6,5" Display: Genießen Sie ein beeindruckendes Seherlebnis mit dem großen Mini-drop-Fullscreen - perfekt zum Streamen von Videos, Spielen oder Surfen.
  • 3-fach Karten-Steckplatz (2 SIM + 1 MicroSD): Genießen Sie die Vorteile von Dual-SIM-Karten und erweiterbarem Speicherplatz gleichzeitig.

🛒 Hier!!

item.description:

ℹ️:

  • Starker 5000-mAh-Akku & 33 W Dart-Aufladung
  • Qualcomm Snapdragon 695-Prozessor verwendet eine fortschrittliche 6 nm-Technologie
  • 120 Hz Bildwiederholrate & Touch-Abtastrate von 240 Hz
  • Mit dem realme 9 Pro kannst du zwei 5G-SIM-Karten gleichzeitig verwenden
  • 64 MP Nachtlandschaft-Kamera & 16 MP Selfie-Kamera
